oids.name: zxAnChassisSysReboot
oids.description: Reboot system.

oids.name: zxAnChassisSysLastSwapReason
oids.description:
Last swap request,such as force,plug-out or others.
                     forced(1)       swap by command or network management,
                     cardOffline(2)  swap by the main control board poweroff 
                                     or pull out,
                     reset(3)        swap by the main control board reset self,
                     cardDown(99)    swap by other reason.

oids.name: zxAnChassisPnpMode
oids.description:
config Ne card PNP mode,PNP mode means when card on shelf,
                    then this card can use without add it

oids.name: zxAnChassisSysRebootTimesClear
oids.description:
Clear the system rebooting times.
             When get this variable, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnRackTable
oids.description:
This table includes the enable or disable plug and play of 
                    the rack.

oids.name: zxAnRackEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnRackTable. This table is not supported in C6XX.

oids.name: zxAnRack
oids.description: The range of zxAnRack is 1~1 for DT

oids.name: zxAnRackActualType
oids.description: This MIB is defined for actual rack type.

oids.name: zxAnRackConfType
oids.description: This MIB is defined for configged rack type.

oids.name: zxAnRackInvSn
oids.description:
This MIB is defined for serial number of this rack.
              it is used by inventroy management.

oids.name: zxAnRackRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.

             To create a row in this table, a manager must
             set this object to createAndGo(4).
          
             In particular, a newly created row cannot be created
             until the corresponding zxAnRackConfType have been set.
             
             To delete a row in this table, a manager must
             set this object to destroy(6).

oids.name: zxAnSlot
oids.description:
The range of zxAnSlot is 0~20 for DT IEC-SHELF,
                         and  the range of zxAnSlot is 0~22 for DT ETSI-SHELF

oids.name: zxAnEnvShelfVoltage
oids.description:
Voltage of the shelf.
             Value 0 means not available.

oids.name: zxAnCardVoltage
oids.description:
Voltage of the card.
             Value 0 means not available.

oids.name: zxAnEnvEmergencyBatteryVoltage
oids.description: The current voltage of the battery.

oids.name: zxAnPowerSupplyInVoltage
oids.description: The actual input volts of the power supply module.

oids.name: zxAnPowerSupplyInVoltageStatus
oids.description:
The volt status of the power supply.
                
                normal(1)       -- The input power is normal.
                overVoltage(2)  -- The input power is over voltage.
                underVoltage(3) -- The input power is under voltage.
                off(4))         -- No power input.

oids.name: zxAnPowerInVoltageUpperThresh
oids.description:
The upper threshold of input volts.The alarm should be generated
        when zxAnPowerSupplyInVoltage exceeds this threshold.
            If it is 0, no alarm reported to manager.

oids.name: zxAnPowerInVoltageLowerThresh
oids.description:
The lower threshold of input volts.The alarm should be generated
        when zxAnPowerSupplyInVoltage is lower than this threshold.
            If it is 0, no alarm reported to manager.

oids.name: zxAnFanTrayVoltage
oids.description:
Voltage of the fan tray.
             Value 0 means not available.

oids.name: zxAnIfGlobalMaxFrameLength
oids.description:
Global system maximum frame size, specifies the maximum frame size
             on all interfaces(PON ports and uplink interfaces). The invalid
             frame whose size is larger than the object will be discarded.

oids.name: zxAnEtherIfHoldoffTime
oids.description:
Global system ethernet interface hold-off time.
             Hold-off time: The time between the declaration of a signal 
             fail (SF) or signal degrade (SD) condition and the initialization 
             of the protection switching algorithm.

oids.name: zxAnIfConfTable
oids.description: This table includes the interface configuration infomation.

oids.name: zxAnIfConfEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnIfConfTable.

oids.name: zxAnIfConfAdminStatus
oids.description: Enable/disable the interface.

oids.name: zxAnIfConfLockStatus
oids.description:
Lock/unlock the interface.
             unlocked -- release the locked status.
             locked   -- disable the service and alarm of this interface.

oids.name: zxAnEtherIfTable
oids.description: This table includes the ethernet-like interface configuration.

oids.name: zxAnEtherIfEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnEtherIfTable.

oids.name: zxAnEtherIfConfDuplexSpeed
oids.description:
DURABLE: { auto_negotiate:all }
            The desired speed and duplex for this interface. If the selected
            control is not possible on the interface, a value of illegal(99)
            is returned.  If the port type does NOT support the default
            of auto_negotiate(1), then the application initializes the
            port to a valid value (e.g., 1000full(6)).  Note that not all
            controls are possible for all interfaces.  For example, only
            full-1000(6) is available for Gigabit Ethernet interfaces.

oids.name: zxAnEtherIfConfConnectorType
oids.description:
The connector tpye of this interface,such as fibre or copper or
             auto.
             If no connector should be regard,it is notConfigured.

oids.name: zxAnEtherIfConfFlowCtrlEnable
oids.description: Enable/disable the ehternet flow control.

oids.name: zxAnEtherIfConf10GEPhyType
oids.description:
The physical tpye of this interface,it is used by 10GE interface
         only now.

oids.name: zxAnEtherIfConf10GERefClk
oids.description:
The reference clock used by this interface.
             It is used by 10GE port.

oids.name: zxAnAtmPvcIfTable
oids.description: This table includes the ATM PVC infomation.

oids.name: zxAnAtmPvcIfEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnAtmPvcIfTable.

oids.name: zxAnAtmPvcIfVpi
oids.description: VPI.

oids.name: zxAnAtmPvcIfVci
oids.description: VCI.

oids.name: zxAnAtmPvcIfEncapsType
oids.description: Encapsulation type of this ATM PVC.

oids.name: zxAnAtmPvcIfAdminStatus
oids.description: Enable/disable PVC.

oids.name: zxAnAtmPvcIfRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.

            The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
            'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.

            To create a row in this table, a manager must set this object to
            createAndGo(4), and must comply with the multi-variables binding
            rule described in zxAnAtmPvcIfEntry.

            To delete a row in this table, a manager must set this object to
            destroy(6).

            To get this object, the agent always returns active(1).

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfTable
oids.description: This table includes the Mng port  infomation.

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnOutOfBandIfTable.

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfAdminStatus
oids.description:
The desired state of the interface.  The testing(3) state
            indicates that no operational packets can be passed.  When a
            managed system initializes, all interfaces start with
            ifAdminStatus in the down(2) state.  As a result of either
            explicit management action or per configuration information
            retained by the managed system, ifAdminStatus is then
            changed to either the up(1) or testing(3) states (or remains
            in the down(2) state).

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfDuplexSpeed
oids.description:
DURABLE: { auto_negotiate:all }
            The desired speed and duplex for this interface. If the selected
            control is not possible on the interface, a value of illegal(99)
            is returned.  If the port type does NOT support the default
            of auto_negotiate(1), then the application initializes the
            port to a valid value (e.g., 1000full(6)).  Note that not all
            controls are possible for all interfaces.  For example, only
            full-1000(6) is available for Gigabit Ethernet interfaces.

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfTagMode
oids.description:
The tag mode for this interface.
            untagged(1):zxAnSysOutbandPortVlanId and zxAnSysOutbandPortCos
            are invalid.
            tagged(2): zxAnSysOutbandPortVlanId is required.
            zxAnSysOutbandPortCos is optional.
            If VLAN ID and CoS are configured, the packet which has the same
            VLAN ID and CoS can be received.
            If only VLAN ID is configured,the packet which has the same VLAN ID
            can be received.

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfVid
oids.description: VLAN ID for this interface. Value 0 means unconfigured.

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfCos
oids.description: CoS value for this interface. Value 255 means unconfigured.

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfConfNegotiation
oids.description:
This object is defined for C600 series NE.
             The desired negotiation for this interface. 
             If the selected control is not possible on the interface, a value 
             of illegal(99) is returned. 
             If this value is auto, zxAnOutOfBandIfConfDuplex and 
             zxAnOutOfBandIfConfSpeed can not be set.
             Only if this value is force, zxAnOutOfBandIfConfDuplex and 
             zxAnOutOfBandIfConfSpeed can be set.

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfConfDuplex
oids.description:
This object is defined for C600 series NE.
             The desired duplex for this interface. 
             If the selected control is not possible on the interface, a value 
             of illegal(99) is returned. 
             If zxAnOutOfBandIfConfNegotiation value is auto, this object can 
             not be set.

oids.name: zxAnOutOfBandIfConfSpeed
oids.description:
This object is defined for C600 series NE.
             The desired speed for this interface. 
             speed10 : 10M,
             speed100 : 100M,
             If the selected control is not possible on the interface, a value 
             of illegal(99) is returned. 
             If zxAnOutOfBandIfConfNegotiation value is auto, this object
             can not be set.

oids.name: zxAnInnerPortStatusTable
oids.description: This table includes the inner port status of the line card.

oids.name: zxAnInnerPortStatusEntry

components.name: shelf
components.note: rack constante en equipos single-shelf; revalidar el layout de bits en despliegues multi-shelf

oids.description: An entry in zxAnInnerPortStatusTable.

oids.name: zxAnInnerPortRack
oids.description: This object indicates the rack number.

oids.name: zxAnInnerPortSlot
oids.description: This object indicates the slot number.

oids.name: zxAnLeftConnectInnerPortStatus
oids.description:
This object indicates the inner port status connected with the 
            left control card.

oids.name: zxAnRightConnectInnerPortStatus
oids.description:
This object indicates the inner port status connected with the 
            right control card.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalVoltageLowerThresh
oids.description:
The lower limit threshold on optical modules supply voltage.
             The alarm should be generated when zxAnOpticalSupplyVoltage 
             is lower than this threshold.
             The unit is 1 Volt when the value of opticalAlarmPrfUnit(1) is 1, 
             otherwise the unit is 0.1 Volt.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalVoltageUpperThresh
oids.description:
The upper limit threshold on optical modules supply voltage.
             The alarm should be generated when zxAnOpticalSupplyVoltage 
             exceeds this threshold.
             The unit is 1 Volt when the value of opticalAlarmPrfUnit(1) is 1, 
             otherwise the unit is 0.1 Volt.

oids.name: zxAnOptAlsEnable
oids.description: Enable or disable the ALS function.

oids.name: zxAnOptAlsLaserLosDuration
oids.description:
This attribute specifies the value of the LOS duration. 
            The laser will be shutdown when detected the LOS duration 
            longer than zxAnOptAlsLaserLosDuration value.
            Setting this object will enable the ALS function.
            For C300 Series NE, the default value is 5.
            For C600 Series NE, the default value is 50.

oids.name: zxAnOptAlsLaserShutdownDuration
oids.description:
This attribute specifies the value of the laser shutdown 
            duration. 
            Setting this object will enable the ALS function.

oids.name: zxAnOptAlsLaserStartUpDuration
oids.description:
This attribute specifies the value of the laser re-open 
            duration.
            Setting this object will enable the ALS function.

The 15-minute interval historical performance data table of the

The 1-day interval historical performance data table of the

oids.name: zxAnOptChanH1DIntervalNo

oids.description:
The minutes interval performance data table of the optical
             module channel.

oids.description: An entry of zxAnOptChanCurrMinPerfTable.

oids.description:
The minutes interval historical performance data table of the
              optical module channel.

oids.name: zxAnOptChanHisMinPerfEntry
oids.description: An entry of zxAnOptChanHisMinPerfTable.

oids.name: zxAnOptChanHMinIntervalNo

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfCurrPerfTable
oids.description:
PON interface statistics table.
             The 'IfType' of ifIndex supports 1(physical interface) 
             and 5(PON channel).

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfCurrPerfEntry
oids.description: Entry of zxAnPonOltIfCurrPerfTable.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfCurrPerfReset
oids.description:
Clear OLT current statistics,read invalid.
            When get this variable, always return 1.

oids.description:
The current 15 minutes performance data table of PON interface.
             The 'IfType' of ifIndex supports 1(physical interface) 
             and 5(PON channel).

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfCurr15MinPerfEntry
oids.description: Entry of zxAnPonOltIfCurr15MinPerfTable.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfC15MPerfReset

Clear all the current 15-minutes performance variables.
            When get this variable, always return 1.

oids.description:
The minutes interval performance data table of PON OLT.
             The 'IfType' of ifIndex supports 1(physical interface) 
             and 5(PON channel).

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfCurrMinPerfEntry
oids.description: An entry in the OLT minutes interval performance data table.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfCMinPerfReset
oids.description:
Clear all the current minutes performance variables.
            When get this variable, always return 1.

oids.description:
The current 1 day performance data table of PON interface.
             The 'IfType' of ifIndex supports 1(physical interface) 
             and 5(PON channel).

oids.description: Entry of zxAnPonOltIfCurr1DayPerfTable.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfC1DPerfReset

Clear all the current 1 day performance variables.
            When get this variable, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfHis15MinPerfTable
oids.description:
The 15 minutes interval performance data table of PON OLT.
             The 'IfType' of ifIndex supports 1(physical interface) 
             and 5(PON channel).

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfHis15MinPerfEntry
oids.description: An entry in the OLT 15 minutes interval performance data table.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfH15MIntervalNo
oids.description:
Performance Data Interval.
              
              Interval 1 is the the most recent previous interval; 
              Interval 96 is 24 hours ago.
              Intervals from 2 to 96 are optional.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfHisMinPerfTable
oids.description:
The minutes interval history performance data table of PON OLT.
            The 'IfType' of ifIndex supports 1(physical interface) 
            and 5(PON channel).

oids.description: An entry in the OLT minutes interval history performance data table.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfHMinIntervalNo
oids.description: Performance data interval number.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfHis1DayPerfTable
oids.description:
The 1 day interval performance data table of PON OLT.
             The 'IfType' of ifIndex supports 1(physical interface) 
             and 5(PON channel).

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfHis1DayPerfEntry
oids.description: The 1 day interval performance data entry of interfaces.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltIfH1DIntervalNo
oids.description:
Performance Data 
               
               Interval 1 is the the most recent previous interval
               Interval 7 is 1 week ago.
               Intervals from 2 to 7 are optional.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfTable
oids.description:
The performance alarm threshold profile 
             list table of interfaces.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfEntry
oids.description:
The performance alarm threshold profile 
            applying entry of interfaces.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfName
oids.description: The performance alarm threshold profile name.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.   
                                                  
             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
             'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.         
                                              
             To create a row in this table, a manager must
             set this object to createAndGo(4).                                              
                                                                                             
             To delete a row in this table, a manager must                                   
             set this object to destroy(6).                                                  
                                                                                             
             To query this object, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfConfTable
oids.description: The performance alarm threshold profile table of interfaces.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfConfEntry
oids.description:
An entry in zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfConfTable.
            When a manager wants to create or modify an OLT performance 
            alarm threshold item,it must comply with the multi-variables 
            usage rule that all the mib variables related to same 
            fuction must be in one snmp set operation, the variables have
            only one type: mandatory.
            
            Mandatory variables must be in the one snmp set operation.
                   
            To create an OLT performance alarm threshold item on
            different level, alarm threshold ,restore threshold and 
            zxAnPonOltPerfAlmConfRowStatus should be in one snmp set operation.
            The alarm threshold and restore threshold variables in the 
            one snmp set operationshould be on same level.
            Such as:
            zxAnPonOltPerfRiseAlmThresh and zxAnPonOltPerfRiseAlmClrThresh,
            zxAnPonOltPerfRiseWarnThresh and zxAnPonOltPerfRiseWarnClrThresh,
            zxAnPonOltPerfFallWarnThresh and zxAnPonOltPerfFallWarnClrThresh,
            zxAnPonOltPerfFallAlmThresh and zxAnPonOltPerfFallAlmClrThresh.
            
            To modify an OLT performance alarm threshold item on
            different level,alarm threshold and restore threshold
            should be also in the one snmp set 
            operation regardless of modifying alarm or restore threshold 
            value alone.
            The alarm threshold and restore threshold variables in the 
            one snmp set operationshould be on same level.
            Such as:
            zxAnPonOltPerfRiseAlmThresh and zxAnPonOltPerfRiseAlmClrThresh,
            zxAnPonOltPerfRiseWarnThresh and zxAnPonOltPerfRiseWarnClrThresh,
            zxAnPonOltPerfFallWarnThresh and zxAnPonOltPerfFallWarnClrThresh,
            zxAnPonOltPerfFallAlmThresh and zxAnPonOltPerfFallAlmClrThresh.
            
            To remove an OLT performance alarm threshold item, only 
            zxAnPonOltPerfAlmConfRowStatus should be set to destroy(6) while 
            all levels of this ONU performance alarm threshold item will be 
            removed.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfVariable
oids.description: The object identifier of performance variables.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfRiseAlmThresh
oids.description: The threshold for rising alarm.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfRiseAlmClrThresh
oids.description: The threshold for rising alarm restore.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfRiseWarnThresh
oids.description: The threshold for rising warning.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfRiseWarnClrThresh
oids.description: The threshold for rising warning restore.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfFallWarnThresh
oids.description: The threshold for falling warning.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfFallWarnClrThresh
oids.description: The threshold for falling warning restore.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfFallAlmThresh
oids.description: The threshold for falling alarm.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfFallAlmClrThresh
oids.description: The threshold for falling alarm restore.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfThreshUsed
oids.description: The threshold used flag for falling alarm restore.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmConfRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row. 
            
             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
            'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.
             
             To create a row in this table, a manager must
             set this object to createAndGo(4).
             
             To delete a row in this table, a manager must
             set this object to destroy(6).
             
             To query this object, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfApplyTable
oids.description:
The performance alarm threshold profile applying table of 
              interfaces.
              The 'IfType' of ifIndex supports 1(physical interface) 
              and 5(PON channel).

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfApplyEntry
oids.description:
An entry in zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrfApplyTable.
            When a manager wants to apply an OLT performance alarm 
            profile to specificed OLT interface,it must comply with 
            the multi-variables usage rule that all the mib variables 
            related to same fuction must be in one snmp set operation, 
            the variables have only one type: mandatory.
            
            Mandatory variables must be in the one snmp set operation.
                   
            To apply an OLT performance alarm profile to specificed OLT 
            interface, 'zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrf' and 
            'zxAnPonOltAlmPrfApplyRowStatus' should be in the one snmp set 
            operation.
            To remove the application of an OLT performance alarm profile to 
            the specificed OLT interface, only 
            'zxAnPonOltAlmPrfApplyRowStatus' should be set to destroy(6).

oids.name: zxAnPonOltPerfAlmPrf
oids.description: The performance alarm threshold profile.

oids.name: zxAnPonOltAlmPrfApplyRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row. 
              
             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
             'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.

             To create a row in this table, a manager must
             set this object to createAndGo(4).
            
             To delete a row in this table, a manager must
             set this object to destroy(6).
             
             To query this object, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnSwManualUpdateRack
oids.description:
The rack number.    
            The multi-variables binding rule should be complied 
            with when a manager manual updates software. According 
            to this rule,all the related mib variables must be 
            included in one SNMP set operation. 
                    
            There are two types of variables: mandatory and 
            optional. All of the mandatory variables must be 
            included in one SNMP set operation. Optional variables 
            may be included in one SNMP set operation with the 
            mandatory variables, but must not be used alone. 
                    
            To manual update software, the mandatory and optional 
            variables are as follows:
            mandatoty: zxAnSwManualUpdateRack, 
                       zxAnSwManualUpdateShelf,
                       zxAnSwManualUpdateSlotList, 
                       zxAnSwManualUpdateSwType
            optional : none
                        
            To manual update subcard software, the mandatory and 
            optional variables are as follows:
            mandatoty: zxAnSwManualUpdateRack, 
                       zxAnSwManualUpdateShelf,
                       zxAnSwManualUpdateSlotList, 
                       zxAnSwManualUpdateSwType,
                       zxAnSwManualUpdateSubcardList
            optional : none

oids.name: zxAnSwManualUpdateSlotList
oids.description:
The slot number. updating version file from MP to NP.
            They can be updated in batch. For example: '1,2,3'
            This variable must comply with the multi-variables 
            binding rule described in zxAnSwManualUpdateRack.

oids.name: zxAnSwManualUpdateSwType
oids.description:
The software type is special to update.
            This variable must comply with the multi-variables
            binding rule described in zxAnSwManualUpdateRack.
            bootware(1): update bootware.

oids.name: zxAnSwManualUpdateStatusTable
oids.description:
This table includes the version updating status 
                    information.

oids.name: zxAnSwManualUpdateStatusEntry

oids.description: An entry in zxAnSwManualUpdateStatusTable.

oids.name: zxAnSwManualUpdateSoftwareType
oids.description: The software type when updating version.

oids.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateChkEnable
oids.description:
Enable or disable the software periodic check function.   
                    
                    The multi-variables binding rule should be complied with 
                    when a software periodic check. According to this rule, 
                    all the related mib variables must be included in one SNMP 
                    set operation. 
                    
                    There are two types of variables: mandatory and optional.
                    All of the mandatory variables must be included in one SNMP
                    set operation. Optional variables may be included in one 
                    SNMP set operation with the mandatory variables, but must 
                    not be used alone. 
                    
                    To configure software periodic check(except disable 
                    software periodic check function), the mandatory and 
                    optional variables are as follows:
                    mandatoty: zxAnSwAutoUpdateChkEnable, 
                               zxAnSwAutoUpdateChkStartTime,
                               zxAnSwAutoUpdateChkInterval
                    optional : none

oids.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateChkStartTime
oids.description:
The start time of software periodic check.            
            For example:yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:SS.(2001-01-01 02:22:33).   
            
            This variable must comply with the multi-variables binding 
            rule described in zxAnSwAutoUpdateChkEnable.

oids.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateChkInterval
oids.description:
The interval of software periodic check. 
            Value 0 means unconfigured. 
            Unit is hour.
            
            This variable must comply with the multi-variables binding 
            rule described in zxAnSwAutoUpdateChkEnable.

oids.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateAction
oids.description:
The automatic update action. 
            It means to start the automatic update progress.

oids.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateActiveEnable
oids.description:
Enable or disable the software active function. Active means to 
            reset card except control card.

oids.name: zxAnSwAutoUpdateSwBackupEnable
oids.description: Enable or disable the version file backup function.

oids.name: zxAnSwSwapRack
oids.description:
The Rack No. is used for swap version .
                      The multi-variables binding rule should be complied 
                      with when swap software. According to this rule, 
                      all the related mib variables must be included in one 
                      SNMP set operation. 
                   
                      There are two types of variables: mandatory and optional.
                      All of the mandatory variables must be included in one 
                      SNMP set operation. Optional variables may be included 
                      in one SNMP set operation with the mandatory variables, 
                      but must not be used alone. 
                   
                      To swap software, the mandatory and optional variables 
                      are as follows:
                      mandatoty:zxAnSwSwapRack, zxAnSwSwapShelf, zxAnSwSwapSlot
                      optional :none

oids.name: zxAnSwSwapSlot
oids.description:
The slot number is used for swap version.
                      
                      This variable must comply with the multi-variables
                      binding rule described in zxAnSwSwapRack.

An entry containing management information

Alarm clear status. 0: the only value you can get, 
                     1:set the value means to delete the instance.

oids.name: alarmMaskTable
oids.description: A list of alarm mask entries.

oids.name: alarmMaskEntry
oids.description: An alarm mask entry.

oids.name: alarmMaskTPIDType
oids.description:
Alarm mask TPID type. Valid values range from 1 to 65534; 
             65535 is an invalid value.

oids.name: alarmMaskTPID
oids.description:
Alarm mask TPID. Length is 62 bytes. Valid and invalid values 
            are filled in according to the check point specification.

oids.name: alarmMaskTPIDMask
oids.description:
Each bit indicates whether the corresponding byte 
            in alarmMaskTPID is valid. 1 is valid, 0 is invalid.

oids.name: alarmMaskAlarmCode
oids.description: Alarm code.

oids.name: alarmMaskRowStatus
oids.description: Row status.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmPreloadInterface
oids.description: The interface which canceled proload function.

oids.description: A list of alarm level entries.

Alarm level support 'emergency','alert','critical','error',
           'warning','notification','information','debugging'.Alarm level 
            not support 'all'.

oids.description: Row status.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskTable
oids.description: A list of alarm mask entries.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskEntry
oids.description: An alarm mask entry.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskTPIDType
oids.description: Alarm mask TPID type.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskTPID
oids.description:
Alarm mask TPID. Length is from 62 to 128 bytes. 
             Valid and invalid values are filled 
             in according to the check point specification.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskTPIDMask
oids.description:
Each bit indicates whether the corresponding byte 
             in alarmMaskTPID is valid. 1 is valid, 0 is invalid.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskAlarmCode
oids.description: Alarm code.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskTPIDClass
oids.description: Alarm TPID class.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskTPIDLen
oids.description: Alarm TPID length. Valid value range is from 62 to 128.

oids.name: zxr10AlarmMaskRowStatus
oids.description: Row status.

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfName
oids.description: Alarm shield profile name.

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfRowStatus
oids.description: Row status.

oids.description: A list of alarm shield profile alarm code entries.

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfCodeEntry
oids.description: An alarm shield profile alarm code entry.

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfCodeAlmCode
oids.description: Alarm code.

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfCodeStatus
oids.description: Alarm shield profile status. 1:forever 2:once

oids.description:
Alarm level support 'emergency','alert','critical','error',
           'warning','notification','information','debugging'.Alarm level 
            not support 'all'.

oids.description: A list of alarm shield profile apply entries.

oids.description: An alarm shield profile apply entry.

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfApplyFlag
oids.description: Alarm shield profile apply flag. 1:system 2:board 3:interface

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfApplyBrdName
oids.description: Alarm shield profile apply board name.

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfApplyIfName
oids.description: Alarm shield profile apply interface name.

oids.name: zxr10AlmShdProfApplyRowStatus
oids.description: Row status.

oids.name: zxr10AlmConfirmEnable
oids.description: Enable or disable the alarm confirm.

oids.name: zxr10AlmConfirmTimeout
oids.description:
Specifies the time-out value, in seconds, for an event to be
             confirmed.It must be set with zxr10AlmResendingTimes together.

oids.name: zxr10AlmResendingTimes
oids.description:
The resending event times when device does not receive 
            the event confirm message from the snmp manager.
            It must be set with zxr10AlmConfirmTimeout together.

oids.name: zxr10AlmConfirmFlowId
oids.description:
The cleard Flow Id to be confirmed by a snmp manager.
            When a manager receive a trap with confirmation information,
            then the manager should set this mib object to inform the agent
            that this manager has got this event.And then the agent should
            remove this event from a unconfirmed event queue. It must be 
            set with zxr10AlmConfirmAlarmStatus together.

oids.name: zxr10AlmConfirmAlarmStatus
oids.description: The alarm status of the event to be confirmed.

oids.name: zxr10AlmClearBeginFlowID
oids.description:
The clear begin flow ID, it must be no larger than the 
             end flow ID. 0: the only value you can get.

oids.name: zxr10AlmClearEndFlowID
oids.description:
The clear end flow ID, it must be no less than the begin
             flow ID. 0: the only value you can get.

oids.name: zxr10AlmClearRangeStatus
oids.description:
Alarm clear status. 0: the only value you can get, 
                     1:set the value means to delete the instance.
                     zxr10AlmClearRangeStatus must be set with 
                     zxr10AlmClearBeginFlowID and zxr10AlmClearEndFlowID 
                     together. The clear range number must be less than or 
                     equal to 100. When a manager receive the clear range 
                     oprateion, the current alarms in the range will report 
                     disappear.
